summary: Completed e2e testing of Assistant Melus app. Backend APIs all working (18/19 tests passed, 1 skipped due to credit requirement). Frontend registration, login, and dashboard workspace flows working. Chat message sending triggers credit purchase modal when user has insufficient credits (<100), which is expected behavior.

minor.issue: Requires minimum 100 credits but new users only get 10 free credits (FREE_CREDITS=10 in config.py)
minor.recommendation: Consider increasing FREE_CREDITS to 1000 or lowering the minimum credit requirement to allow new users to try the chat feature

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements - makes automated testing harder
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility issue

action_items: Consider increasing FREE_CREDITS from 10 to at least 1000 so new users can test the chat feature
Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements for better testability
Fix accessibility warning by adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components
critical_code_review_comments: Credit check at line 458 (server.py) requires 100 credits but FREE_CREDITS is only 10 - new users cannot use chat
No data-testid attributes found in frontend code - all interactive elements should have them for testing

test_credentials.note: Test users created with TEST_ prefix emails during testing

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created with TEST_ prefix for registration/login/chat testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully tested and working. Frontend UI flows (registration, login, dashboard workspace) verified. Chat messaging blocked by credit requirement - user needs 100 credits but only has 10. Credit purchase modal working. Stripe integration visible in UI. All tests in /app/backend/tests/test_auth_and_conversations.py can be reused.

features_tested.user_registration: PASS - Form fills, submits, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.user_login: PASS - Existing user can login, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.dashboard_workspace: PASS - Shows conversations table, user credits, new conversation button
features_tested.create_conversation: PASS - Creates conversation and switches to chat view
features_tested.chat_functionality: BLOCKED - Requires 100 credits, new users only have 10
features_tested.credits_display: PASS - Shows 10 credits in header for new users
